title: Types of Mergers: Horizontal mergers involve companies that operate at different levels of...
summary: Distinguish horizontal mergers from vertical mergers based on firms' positions in the supply chain.
prompt: Horizontal mergers involve companies that operate at different levels of the supply chain.
solution: Horizontal mergers occur between companies in the same industry and at the same stage of production, while vertical mergers occur between companies at different levels of the supply chain.
